backend/main.mo: Motoko canister storing user profiles and daily check-ins with access control, age validation, and duplicate check‑in prevention.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence metadata listing implemented features, related files, components, and test IDs for traceability.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of each frontend file across components, pages, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining color variables, theming rules, and base styles for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app root and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main router configuration with authentication gating, onboarding routing, and page layout structure.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Internet Identity login/logout button handling auth state, errors, and React Query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/branding/BrandHe: Clickable brand header showing logo and app name that navigates to the home page.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main app layout with header, navigation, authentication-aware menus, and mobile sheet navigation.
frontend/src/components/risk/RiskSummary: Displays a fall-risk assessment card showing score, level, icon, and contributing factors.
frontend/src/components/shared/Disclaime: Renders a medical disclaimer banner in compact or full form using predefined content.
frontend/src/components/shared/ErrorStat: Shows an error message with optional retry button inside a centered alert.
frontend/src/components/shared/LoadingSt: Displays a centered loading spinner and message inside a card.
frontend/src/components/shared/PrimaryBu: Wraps the base Button component with larger default sizing for primary actions.
frontend/src/content/guidance.ts: Exports disclaimer text and fall-risk guidance strings for low, medium, and high risk levels.
frontend/src/hooks/useAccessibilitySetti: Provides context and hooks for managing text size and contrast modes with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's identity and refreshes dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity authentication, login flow, identity persistence, and exposes auth state via context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, check-ins, and risk assessments via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles, color variables, text-size utilities, contrast modes, and accessibility-focused UI rules.
frontend/src/lib/errors.ts: Normalizes backend and client errors into user-friendly messages with special handling for common conditions.
frontend/src/lib/ukDate.ts: Formats and retrieves UK-local dates, returning ISO strings and human-readable date formats.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Displays information about FallCheck’s purpose, features, and limitations with styled content and a disclaimer.
frontend/src/pages/AccessibilitySettings: Renders controls for adjusting text size and enabling high-contrast mode using accessibility settings.
frontend/src/pages/CheckInConfirmationPa: Shows a completion message after a check-in and provides navigation to risk results, history, or home.
frontend/src/pages/CheckInDetailPage.tsx: Fetches and displays detailed answers from a specific check-in date with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/DailyCheckInPage.tsx: Handles daily check‑in creation, prefilling previous submissions, submitting data, and showing related alerts.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed check‑in results for a specific date, including user answers and corresponding risk assessment.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Shows a list of past check‑ins with risk scores and links to detailed entries.
frontend/src/pages/HowItWorksPage.tsx: Explains the rules‑based fall risk system, scoring method, and limitations.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Collects user profile data such as age, falls history, conditions, and mobility aids, then saves it to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Describes how user data is stored, protected, and accessed within the system.
frontend/src/pages/RiskResultsPage.tsx: Displays the current risk assessment with summary, guidance, and options to navigate to history or new check‑in.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL query/hash params, persist them in sessionStorage, retrieve them with fallback, and clear sensitive params from the hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, typography, container settings, animations, and theme extensions for app styling.
project_state.json: Defines the project’s state, metadata, image requirements, and a list of implemented feature specifications for the fall‑risk check‑in app.
